news.title: Samsung Confirms AI Smart Glasses Launch in 2026
news.summary: Samsung has confirmed the launch of its AI smart glasses in 2026, featuring a 12MP camera, 155mAh battery, and Qualcomm’s AR1 chip.
news.content: Samsung has officially announced its plans to launch AI smart glasses in 2026. The confirmation came during Samsung’s Q4 2025 earnings call. The smart glasses are rumored to include a 12MP camera, 155mAh battery, and Qualcomm’s AR1 chip. These glasses are expected to deliver a multimodal AI experience, combining voice, vision, and sensors for real-time interaction.

news.title: Apple Plans to Launch AI Smart Glasses by End of 2026
news.summary: Apple is accelerating development of its first smart glasses, targeting a late 2026 release with built-in cameras, microphones, and Siri integration.
news.content: Apple plans to release a pair of smart glasses equipped with a camera, microphone, and speaker in late 2026. These smart glasses will have the capability to execute voice commands through Siri. The device is expected to offer various functions such as analyzing the environment, making calls, playing music, providing real-time translation and navigation services. This upcoming product from Apple is seen as a direct competitor to Meta Ray-Ban smart glasses.

news.title: Apple's Vision Products Group Leads Smart Glasses Development
news.summary: Apple's Vision Products Group, which developed the Vision Pro headset, is now leading the development of Apple's AI smart glasses.
news.content: The smart glasses project at Apple is being led by the Vision Products Group, which previously developed the Vision Pro headset. The team is currently working on a lighter version of the headset that can be connected to a Mac. Apart from smart glasses, Apple is also gearing up to launch its first foldable phone by the end of 2026. Furthermore, the company intends to open up its large language model API to encourage the growth of the App Store AI ecosystem.

news.title: Vivo Halts Smart Glasses Project Due to Market Saturation
news.summary: Vivo has halted its smart glasses project after months of development, citing a lack of differentiation in a crowded market.
news.content: Vivo has halted its smart glasses project after months of joint development with partners including Goertek and ThunderSoft. Executives reportedly concluded the product lacked differentiation in a crowded market. The move highlights the broader challenges facing AI-powered eyewear, from hardware complexity to a thin software ecosystem.

news.title: Google Partners with Warby Parker for 2026 AI Smart Glasses Launch
news.summary: Google and Warby Parker have confirmed a 2026 launch for AI-powered smart glasses, leveraging Google's Android XR platform.
news.content: Google has confirmed that its first AI smart glasses will debut in 2026, marking a major expansion of its Android XR ecosystem. Announced during The Android Show: XR Edition, the upcoming devices aim to blend hands-free assistance, real-time information access and stylish, all-day wearability. Google is developing two models in collaboration with Samsung, Gentle Monster and Warby Parker. The first model focuses on screen-free assistance through speakers, microphones and cameras that enable users to talk naturally with Gemini, capture photos and receive contextual help.

news.title: Huawei's Latest Smart Watch Features Advanced Health Monitoring
news.summary: Huawei has announced a new smart watch with advanced health monitoring capabilities, including heart rate tracking and sleep analysis.
news.content: Huawei has unveiled its latest smart watch, which comes with a suite of health monitoring features. The new watch includes heart rate tracking, sleep analysis, and stress level detection, making it a comprehensive health companion. The device also offers smart notifications and is compatible with various fitness apps, allowing users to track their activities and progress towards health goals.

news.title: Apple's M-series Chip Powers New AI PC Line
news.summary: Apple's new M2 chip has been integrated into its latest AI PC lineup, offering improved performance and energy efficiency.
news.content: Apple has announced the integration of its M2 chip into the new lineup of AI PCs. The M2 chip is designed to enhance performance and energy efficiency, making the AI PCs more powerful and reliable. The new AI PCs are expected to deliver faster processing speeds and better integration with Apple's ecosystem, including seamless collaboration with iOS and macOS devices.

news.title: Rokid Launches New AR Glasses for Enterprise Use
news.summary: Rokid, a leading AR technology company, has launched new AR glasses specifically designed for enterprise and industrial applications.
news.content: Rokid has announced the launch of its new AR glasses, which are tailored for enterprise use. These glasses offer advanced features such as 3D modeling, remote collaboration, and hands-free operation, making them ideal for industrial and corporate environments. The new AR glasses from Rokid are expected to revolutionize the way businesses interact with technology and improve工作效率.

news.title: Zephyr RTOS Reaches Major Milestone with 2.0 Release
news.summary: The Zephyr project has released version 2.0 of its RTOS, introducing new features and improvements for embedded systems.
news.content: The Zephyr project has announced the release of Zephyr RTOS 2.0, which brings significant enhancements to the real-time operating system. The new version includes improved security features, better support for multi-core processors, and expanded hardware compatibility. The release is a major milestone for the Zephyr community and is expected to accelerate the development of secure and reliable embedded systems.

news.title: Tuya Smart Partners with Amazon to Expand AI Ecosystem
news.summary: Tuya Smart has partnered with Amazon to integrate Alexa Voice Service into its smart home devices, expanding its AI application ecosystem.
news.content: Tuya Smart, a leading IoT platform, has announced a partnership with Amazon to integrate Alexa Voice Service into its smart home devices. This integration will allow Tuya Smart's devices to be controlled using voice commands through Amazon's Alexa, enhancing the user experience and expanding the AI application ecosystem. The partnership is expected to bring more convenience and智能化 to smart home users worldwide.

news.title: New AI-Powered Robot Vacuums Hit the Market
news.summary: Several new AI-powered robot vacuums have been launched, offering advanced navigation and cleaning capabilities.
news.content: The smart home market has seen the introduction of several new AI-powered robot vacuums. These vacuums use advanced AI algorithms for navigation and obstacle avoidance, providing more efficient and thorough cleaning. The new models also offer features such as smart scheduling, remote control through mobile apps, and integration with other smart home devices.
